query: SELECT concat(p.name, '/', pm.upstream_model) AS "value!" FROM route_draft_targets rdt JOIN provider_models pm ON pm.id = rdt.provider_model_id JOIN providers p ON p.id = pm.provider_id LEFT JOIN provider_revision_models prm ON prm.provider_revision_id = p.active_revision_id AND prm.source_provider_model_id = pm.id WHERE rdt.route_draft_id = $1 AND (p.state = 'disabled'::provider_state OR prm.id IS NULL OR NOT prm.enabled) ORDER BY rdt.position LIMIT 1
